name: CashMax Title & Loan
description_short: CashMax is a Texas short-term lender with 35+ locations offering payday loans, cash advances, and title loans, most funded in 15 minutes.
description_long:
CashMax has operated in Texas for over 20 years, building a network of more than 35 physical store locations across the state. The Fort Worth location on NE 28th Street is one of many storefronts designed to provide fast, in-person access to short-term credit for Texas residents who need cash quickly.

The company offers three core products: payday loans, cash advances, and title loans. Borrowers can apply online or walk into any store location. CashMax advertises that most loans can be completed in as little as 15 minutes, making it one of the faster options for same-day funding. The Fort Worth location is open six days a week, including Saturday mornings, with extended hours on Fridays.

CashMax differentiates itself through its emphasis on customer service and a no-pressure approach. The company explicitly states it avoids pushy or aggressive sales tactics, which is notable in a lending segment known for high-pressure environments. Customer testimonials on the site highlight staff friendliness and flexibility around payment timing, suggesting some willingness to work with borrowers facing difficulties.

Honestly, CashMax operates in one of the most expensive corners of consumer lending. Payday loans and title loans in Texas routinely carry APRs in the triple digits, and the website discloses no rates, fees, or APR ranges — a significant transparency gap. Title loans carry the additional risk of vehicle repossession on default. CashMax is a viable last-resort option for Texas residents who have exhausted cheaper alternatives, but borrowers should ask for full cost disclosure before signing anything.
pros: Over 35 Texas store locations for in-person access
Most loans funded in approximately 15 minutes
Explicitly no-pressure, no pushy sales tactics
20+ years operating in Texas — established track record
Online application available in addition to in-store
cons: No APR, fee, or cost information published anywhere on the website
Title loans risk vehicle repossession if you default
Texas-only — no availability outside the state
Closed Sundays, limited Saturday window (9am–2pm only)
Payday and title loans are among the most expensive credit products available
best_for: Texas residents who need cash same-day and have no bank or credit union alternative
Borrowers with a vehicle willing to use it as collateral for a title loan
People who prefer in-person service and need help navigating the loan process
Repeat short-term borrowers already familiar with payday loan costs and terms
diagnosis: CashMax is best suited for Texas residents facing an immediate cash shortfall who cannot access a bank loan, credit union PAL, or employer advance. The 15-minute in-store funding and 35+ locations make it genuinely accessible. The primary caveat is cost: payday and title loans in Texas carry some of the highest rates in the country, and CashMax publishes no rate information — borrowers must ask directly before committing.
